notes: Live 2026-04 Storefront evidence creates disposable catalog merchandise, a fixed-rate delivery profile, discounts, a gift card, a customer, and real carts; exercises cart core plus delivery-address ownership/order/validation/limits, delivery groups/options/selections, checkout URL shape, buyer identity, discount, gift-card, metafield, recalculation, warning, and error branches; and cleans up every Admin resource. Cart secrets, personal address fields, adjustment secrets, passwords, and customer tokens are consistently redacted. Shopify accepted a recorded Admin delivery-profile rate update but the existing cart did not expose the change during the bounded capture window, so immediate Admin-to-cart propagation is runtime-test-only and is not a parity claim. Proxy replay stages every scoped write locally from shared product, inventory, location, shipping-profile/rate, publication, money, customer, market-context, and metafield semantics. Carrier-service execution, checkout navigation/payment capture, and order creation remain intentionally unsupported.
